targets.expr: label_replace(up{job="hkt-exporter"}, "device", "mac-mini1", "", "") or label_replace(up{job="hkt-exporter-asmhk-macbook"}, "device", "mac-book1", "", "") or label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-mini2", "", "") or label_replace(vector(0), "device", "mac-studio1", "", "") or label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio2", "", "") or label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio3", "", "") or label_replace(vector(0), "device", "mac-studio4", "", "")

label_replace(machine_os_info{job="hkt-exporter"}, "device", "mac-mini1", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-mini2", "", ""), "hostname", "mac-mini2.local", "", ""), "distro", "macOS", "", ""), "release", "14.6", "", ""), "arch", "arm64", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio1", "", ""), "hostname", "mac-studio1.local", "", ""), "distro", "macOS", "", ""), "release", "14.6", "", ""), "arch", "arm64", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio2", "", ""), "hostname", "mac-studio2.local", "", ""), "distro", "macOS", "", ""), "release", "14.6", "", ""), "arch", "arm64", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio3", "", ""), "hostname", "mac-studio3.local", "", ""), "distro", "macOS", "", ""), "release", "14.6", "", ""), "arch", "arm64", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio4", "", ""), "hostname", "mac-studio4.local", "", ""), "distro", "macOS", "", ""), "release", "14.6", "", ""), "arch", "arm64", "", "") or label_replace(machine_os_info{job="hkt-exporter-asmhk-macbook"}, "device", "mac-book1", "", "")

label_replace(machine_hw_info{job="hkt-exporter"}, "device", "mac-mini1", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-mini2", "", ""), "version", "Mac mini", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio1", "", ""), "version", "Mac Studio", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio2", "", ""), "version", "Mac Studio", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio3", "", ""), "version", "Mac Studio", "", "") or label_replace(label_replace(vector(1), "device", "mac-studio4", "", ""), "version", "Mac Studio", "", "") or label_replace(machine_hw_info{job="hkt-exporter-asmhk-macbook"}, "device", "mac-book1", "", "")
